title: Lab-on-a-Chip and Biomedical Microsystems
summary: Microfluidic platforms for cell handling, cell mechanics, droplet generation, and biomedical measurement.

title: Plasma-Enabled Microfluidic Fabrication
summary: Atmospheric-pressure plasma processes for fast, patternable surface treatment and bonding of microfluidic chips.

title: Micro/Nano Robotics and Manipulation
summary: Robotic systems for high-speed manipulation, grasping, contact modeling, and micro-scale interaction.

title: Viscoelastic Contact Interfaces
summary: Modeling and sensing of deformable contact interfaces for robotic manipulation and microsystem interaction.
